text_en: RESOLUTIONS ADOPTED ON THE REPORTS OF THE FOURTH COMMITTEE
text_fr: RESOLUTIONS  ADOPTEES  SUR  LES  RAPPORTS  DE  LA  QUATRIEME  COMMISSION

text_en: 64.3 (VII), Aocial situation dana lea territoirea DOD autoDomea
text_fr: 64,3  (VII), Situation  aociale  dana  lea  territoirea DOD  autoDomea

text_en: 644 (Vll). Racial discrimination
text_fr: 644  (Vll).  Discriminations racialea dana lea terri· toire· non autonomea

text_en: The General Assembly,
text_fr: L' Assemblce generale,

text_en: Taking note of the report of the Committee on Information on the Social Situation of Non-Self-Governing Territories, 1
text_fr: Prenant  note du  rapport  du  Comite  des  renseigne› ments  relatifs  aux  territoires  non  autonomes  sur  la situation sociale de ces  territoires 1 ,

text_en: 1. Approves the report of the Committee as a brief but reflective statement of the social situation in the Non-Self-Governing Territories and of the problems of social progress;
text_fr: 1. Approuve le  rapport du Comite  comme constituant un  expose succinct mais  reflechi  de  la  situation  sociale des  territoires  non  autonomes  ainsi  que  des  problemes du  progres social ;

text_en: 2. Invites the Secretary-General to transmit this report for consideration to the States Members of the United Nations having the responsibility for administering Non-Self-Governing Territories, the Economic and Social Council, the Trusteeship Council and interested specialized institutions.
text_fr: 2. Invite le  Secretaire  general a transmettre  ce  rap› port, pour examen, aux Etats Membres de l'Organisation des  Nations Unies ayant la  responsabilite  de  !'adminis› tration de  territoires non  autonomes,  au  Conseil  econo› mique et social,  au Conseil  de tutelle  et  aux  institutions specialisees  interessees.

text_en: 402nd plenary session, 10 December 1952.
text_fr: 402eme seance pleniere, le  10 decembre  1952.

text_en: The General Assembly,
text_fr: L' Assemblce generate,

text_en: Having regard to the principles of the Charter and the Universal Declaration of Human Rights, which require that respect for human rights and fundamental freedoms be developed and promoted for all without distinction as to race, sex, language or religion,
text_fr: Eu egard aux principes de  la  Charte et de  la  Declara› tion  universelle  des  droits  de  l'homme qui  veulent  que !'on  developpe  et  encourage  le  respect  des  droits  de l'homme et  des  libertes  fondamentales  pour  tous  sans distinction de  race, de sexe, de  langue ou  de  religion,

text_en: Bearing in mind the principle of the primacy of the interests of the inhabitants of the Non-Self-Governing Territories, recognized in Chapter XI of the Charter,
text_fr: Ea egard au  principe de  la  primaute des  interets des habitants  des  territoires  non  autonomes,  reconnu  clans le  Chapitre  XI de  la  Charte,

text_en: Recognizing that there is a fundamental difference between laws and discriminatory practices, on the one hand, and measures to protect indigenous rights, on the other hand,
text_fr: Reconnaissant qu'il existe une difference fondamentale entre  Jes  lois  et  les  pratiques  discriminatoires,  d'une part,  et  Jes  mesures  de  protection  destinees a garantir les  droits  des  autochtones,  d'autre part,

text_en: 1. Recommends that States:\Members administering Non-Self-Governing Territories abolish in these territoriesJes laws and practices which are discriminatory contrary to the principles of the Charter and the United Declaration of Human Rights:
text_fr: 1. Recommande aux Etats :\Iembres qui  administrent des  territoires  non  autonomes  d'abolir dans  ces  terri› toires Jes  lois  et Jes  pratiques discriminatoires contraires aux  principes  de  la  Charte  et  de  la  Declaration  uni› verselle  des  droits de  l'homme:

text_en: 2. Recommends that the examiting Members of the Executive Board shall make all laws, regulations and ordinances in force in the Non-Self-Governing Territories which they administer, and their application in those Territories, with a view to abolishing any discriminatory provisions or practices of that order that may exist;
text_fr: 2. Recommande aux Membres administrants d'exami› ner  toutes  les  lois,  tous  Jes  reglements  et  toutes  les ordonnances  en  vigueur  dans  les  territoires  non  auto› nomes  qu'ils  administrent,  ainsi  que  leur  application dans  ces  territoires,  en  vue  d'abolir toutes  dispositions ou pratiques discriminatoires de cet ordre qui pourraient exister;

text_en: 3. Recommends that, in the non-autonomous territories or there are laws which establish a distinction between citizens and non-citizens based essentially on considerations of race or religion, such laws shall be the subject of a similar examination;
text_fr: 3. Reconzmande que,  dans  les  territoires  non  auto› nomes ou  ii  existe des  lois  qui  etablissent entre  citoyens et  non-citoyens  une  distinction  fondee  essentiellement sur des  considerations  de  race  ou  de  religion,  lesdites lois  £assent  l'objet d'un examen  similaire;

text_en: 4. Recommends that all inhabitants of Non-Self-Governing Territories, without distinction as to race, have access to all public facilities;
text_fr: 4. Recommande que  tous Jes  habitants des  territoires non  autonomes,  sans  distinction  de  race,  aient  acces  a toutes  Jes  facilites  publiques;

text_en: 5. Recommends that, in my case or laws, special protective measures be provided for certain groups of the population, such laws shall be subject to a review which shall determine whether their main purpose is to provide protection and whether there is a need to provide for derogations in the light of the circumstances;
text_fr: 5. Recommande que, dans Jes  cas ou Jes  lois  prevoient des  mesures  de  protection  speciales  en  faveur  de  cer› tains groupes de  la  population,  ces  lois  £assent  frequem› ment  l'objet d'un examen  qui  permette  de  determiner si  leur  objet  principal  reste  d'assurer une  protection  et s'il y  a  lieu  de  prevoir  des  derogations  dans  des  cir› constances  p~rti<-ulieres;

text_en: 6. Recognises that the improvement of racial relations depends, to a large extent, on the progress of the policy followed in the field of education and apouvais all Is intended to give to all the students of all schools a better understanding of the needs and problems of !' as a whole of the collectivite;
text_fr: 6. Recannait que  !'amelioration des  relations  raciales depend,  dans  une  large  mesure,  des  progres  de  la politique  suivie  en  matiere  d'enseignement et  aporouve toutes  Jes  mesures  destinees a donner a tous  les  eleves de  toutes  Jes  ecoles  une  meilleure  comprehension  des besoins et des problemes de !'ensemble de  la collectivite;

text_en: 7. Draws the attention of the Commission on Human Rights to the present resolution.
text_fr: 7. Appelle l'attention de  la  Commission des  droits de l'homme sur la presente  resolution.

text_en: 402nd plenary session, 10 December 1952.
text_fr: 402eme seance pleniere, le  10 decembre 1952.

text_en: 645 (VII). Economic policy, 11oC of the 11th year of education and training, 11oC of the 11th year of employment, 11oC of the 11th year of employment, 11oC of the 11th year of employment, 11oC of the 11th year of employment, 11oC of the 11th year of employment, 11oC of the 11th year of employment.
text_fr: 645  (VII).  Politique  en  matiere  economique, 11ociale  ~t  de  l'en11eignement  dan1  lea  terri› toire11  non  autonome1

text_en: The General Assembly,
text_fr: L' Assemblee gencrale,

text_en: Whereas the Committee on Information on Non-Self-Governing Territories has been invited to address to the General Assembly at each ordinary session reports containing such substantive suggestions as it considers appropriate on technical issues in general,
text_fr: C onsidcrant que le Comite des renseignements relatifs aux territoires non  autotiomes  a  ete  invite a adresser a I' Assemblee generale,  !ors de chaque session  ordinaire 2 , des  rapports  contenant  telles  suggestions  de  fond  qu'il estimera convenables concernant les questions techniques en  general,

text_en: Consideran that in 1950, 1951 and 1952, the General Assembly approved the special reports which the Committee on Information on Non-Self-Governing Territories had drafted on the economic situation, the social situation and the situation of education and which it invited the Secretary General to transmit these reports, for consideration, to the Member States of the United Nations Organization having the responsibility to administer Non-Self-Governing Territories,
text_fr: Consideran~ qu'en  1950,  1951  et  1952,  l'Assemblee generale a approuve' les  rapports speciaux que le  Comite des  renseignements  relatifs  aux  territoires  non  auto› nomes  avait  rediges  sur  la  &ituation  economique,  la situation  sociale  et  la  situation  de  l'enseignement  et qu'elle a  invite  Jes  Secretaire general  a transmettre ces rapports,  pour examen, aux  Etats Membres  de  l'Orga› nisation  des  Nations  Unies  ayant  la  responsabilite d'administrer des  territoires  non  autonomes,

text_en: Recognizing that these reports express the views and objectives of a general nature which should be taken into account when formulating a policy,
text_fr: Reconnaissant que  ces  rapports  expriment  des  vues et des  objectifs  de  caractere general  dont  ii  y  a  lieu  de tenir  compte  quand  ii  s'agit de  formuler  une  politique,

text_en: 1. Ex takes precedence over the hope that, when I am interested in providing information pursuant to Article 73 of the Charter, I shall give Each year as complete as possible information on any measures taken to report on the reports of the Committee on Information relating to Non-Self-Governing Territories shall be brought to the attention of the authorities responsible for the implementation of economic, social and educational policy, as well as any problems which may arise in the application of general considerations arising from such reports;
text_fr: 1. Ex prime l' espoir que  Jes  Membres interesses, lors› qu 'ils communiqueront des renseignements en application de  l'alinea e  de I' Article  73  de  la  Charte,  donneront chaque  annee  des  renseignements  aussi  complets  que possible sur toute mesure prise pour signaler les  rapports du  Comite  des  renseignements  relatifs  aux  territoires non  autonomes a }'attention des  autorites  responsables, clans  les · divers  territoires,  de  la  mise  en  reuvre  de  la politique economique,  sociale et de  l'enseignement, ainsi que  sur tout  probleme  que  pourrait  poser  }'application des considerations generales enoncees clans  ces  rapports;

text_en: 2. Invites the Committee on Information from Non-Self-Governing Territories to consider, in its annual reports to the General Assembly, the relevant information pursuant to Article 73 of the Charter on the basis of the special reports on the economic, social and educational situation.
text_fr: 2. Invite le  Comite  des  renseignements  relatifs  aux territoires non autonomes a examiner, dans ses  rapports annuels a I' Assemblee generale, les  renseignements com› muniques  en  application  de  l'alinea e  de  l' Article  73  de la  Charte  en  s'inspirant  des  considerations  enoncees dans Jes  rapports  speciaux  sur la  situation economique, la  situation  sociale  et  la  situation de  l'enseignement.

text_en: 402nd plenary session, 10 December 1952.
text_fr: 402e-ne seance pleniere, le  10 decembre  1952.

text_en: 646 (VII). Resumption of the 11th Committee on Education11 relating to Non-Self-Governing Territories111
text_fr: 646  (VII).  Reconduction  du  Comite  de11  ren› aeignement11 relatif1 aux  territoire11 non autonome1

text_en: The General Assembly,
text_fr: L' Assemblee generai,e,

text_en: Having constituted, by its resolution 332 (IV), adopted on 2 December 1949, a Committee on Information relating to Non-Self-Governing Territories,
text_fr: Ayant constitue, par sa resolution 332  (IV), adoptee le  2 decembre 1949,  un Comite des  renseignements rela› tifs  aux territoires  non  autonomes,

text_en: Recognizing the utility of the work of this Committee,
text_fr: Reconnaissant l'utilite des  travaux de  ce  Comite,

text_en: Recalling that by its resolution 332 (IV) it had decided to examine "in 1952 the question of whether the Special Committee should be re-established for a new period, as well as the question of the composition and mandate of this new Special Committee",
text_fr: Rappelant que  par sa  resolution  332  (IV)  elle  avait decide  d'examiner "en  1952  la question  de  savoir  si  le Comite  special  devrait  etre  reconstitue  pour  une  nou› velle  periode,  ainsi  que  la  question  de  la  composition et d'l mandat de ce  nouveau  Comite  special",

text_en: Having re-examined the mandate of the Committee and its composition, contained in its resolution 332 (IV) and in its resolution 333 (IV),
text_fr: Ayant examine a nouveau le  mandat du  Comite ainsi que  Jes  dispositions  relatives a sa composition,  qui figurent clans  sa resolution 332  (IV) et  Jes  dispositions relatives  aux  travaux  du  Comite,  qui  figurent  clans  sa resolution 333  (IV),

text_en: 1. Decides that the Committee on Information concerning Non-Self-Governing Territories shall remain in office, subject to the same conditions, for a further period of three years;
text_fr: 1. Decide que  le  Comite  des  renseignements  relatifs aux territoires non autonomes restera en  fonctions,  clans Jes  memes  conditions,  pendant  une  nouvelle  periode  de trois ans;

text_en: 2. Directs the Fourth Committee, acting on behalf of the General Assembly, to fill the seats which become vacant among the members of the Committee who do not administer Non-Self-Governing Territories;
text_fr: 2. Charge la  Quatrieme  Commission,  agissant  au nom  de  I' Assemblee  generale,  de  pourvoir  aux  sieges qui devienflraient vacants parmi Jes  membres du Comite qui n'administrent pas de territoires non autonomes;

text_en: 3. Decides that the General Assembly at its regular session of 1955 shall consider whether the Committee on Information from Non-Self-Governing Territories should be re-established for a further period, as well as the composition and mandate of any such committee.
text_fr: 3. Decide qu'a sa session ordinaire de  1955,  l'Assem› blee  generale  examinera  la  question  de  savoir  si  le Comite  des  renseignements  relatifs  aux territoires  non autonomes  devrait  etre  reconstitue  pour  une  nouvelle periode,  ainsi  que  la  question  de  la  composition  et  du mandat  de  tout  comite  de  cette  nature  qui  serait  cree.

text_en: 402nd plenary session, 10 December 1952.
text_fr: 402eme seance pleniere, le  10 decembre 1952.

text_en: In accordance with the provisions of Resolutions 332 (IV) and 646 (VII), the Fourth Commission, acting on behalf of the apparently gineral As›, shall, at its 306th meeting, hold It 15 December 1952, four members of the Committee on Information on Non-Self-Governing Territories to replace Bresil, Egypt, India and the Union of Soviet Socialist Republics.
text_fr: En  conformile  des dispositions des  resolutions 332  (IV) et 646  (VII), la  Quatrieme  Commission,  agissant  au  nom de  l'As› semblee  ginerale,  elit a sa  306eme  seance, tenut  It 15  decembrt 1952, quatre men1bres  du  Comite  des  renseignemmts relatifs aux territoires non autonomes en  remplacement du  Bresil, de  l'Egyfllt, de  l'lnde et de  /'Union des  Republiques socialistes  sovietiques.

text_en: The Member States are: BatsrL, CHINA, INDIA and IRAK.
text_fr: Les  Etats  Membrts elus  sont:  le BatsrL, la CHINE,  l'lNDE et l'IRAK.
